{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211439521A069DE268B2EE9BB7D6"}"},"total":5119},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442210549550465854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常惊艳，因为名字我好几次没看，但看了后发现绝对精彩。龙搁浅滩终入海，此身仍处风云中。剧情前呼后应，内容完整，总有波澜带来故事。很期待后续发展。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732781020,"group_id":"7417923781370334233","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"I am tarnished,lord of elden.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1a/8nEL/CwxZyQbmtQJIjF06rkeN1XpxPi33YBIFLS+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dadc2a7650e84de69b8b465744c46f5b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619065&x-signature=o%2FPR%2BgYiMwx6uLjBPWxCLiYb8WE%3D","user_id":"4070817557645963","user_name":"遗忘着。。。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4070817557645963","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7417923781370334233","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统挂机、凡人流、非爽文、法术智斗、从头开始】
即便在穿越者中唐真也属于运气爆棚那批。
在穿越后的第十八个年头，凭借机制简单但功能暴力的复制术法系统，他成为了修行届千年来最强一代天骄的领军人物。
正派肱骨们对他看护有加。
魔道巨擘们与他亦敌亦友。
圣人之女是他青梅，魔道妖女与他患难。
他本准备就这么在波澜壮阔中走完这口水文一般的主角人生。
。。。
但，天有不测风云。
许是作者找了代笔，小说转了分区，编辑要求打榜，总之唐真在一次普通的主角困境中失去了一切，包括主角光环。
